title: Human Design bodygraph structure
description: The bodygraph wiring as structural fact: nine centers, gate-to-center membership, and the 36 channels as gate pairs. Gate numbers share the King Wen numbering with hexagrams.json. Keynote text is not included; this schema describes the substrate only.

name.description: Center token. Matches the enum used by downstream consumers so joins stay mechanical.

gates.description: Gates housed in this center. Every gate 1 to 64 appears in exactly one center; examples/validate.py enforces the partition.

id.description: The channel's gate pair as low-high, e.g. '25-51'.

centers.description: The two centers this channel connects. Derivable from the gates' center membership; examples/validate.py checks the consistency.

name.description: The canonical channel keynote name from Ra Uru Hu's published material. Stays null in this repo pending canonical contribution; the same precedent as the hexagram name field.
